授業目的: The purpose of this lecture is to deepen the understandings of foreign aid. Specifically, we will learn aid allocation and effectiveness, Japanese aid, Chinese aid, and several topics on aid in relation to debt, trade, growth, corruption, and war.
到達目標: (1) Students understand the foreign aid based on academic research(2) Students understand the nature and characteristics of Japanese and Chinese aid(3) Students formalize idea, write a report, and make a presentation
関連科目: ミクロ経済学, Basic Economics

第1回:
[Startup Week] Online class (on-demand format) /《90 min》Course guidance.
https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=78582f20-6287-40fc-8834-b41d00207355
第2回: [Core Week ➀] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Aid allocation: Why and how is aid provided?
第3回: [Core Week ②] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Aid effectiveness: Is aid really effective?
第4回: [Core Week ③] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Japanese aid 1: Origin, evolution, and challenges
第5回: [Flex Hours] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Japanese aid 2: Characteristics
第6回: [Core Week ④] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Japanese aid 3: Its link to infrastructure exports
第7回: [Core Week ⑤] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Chinese aid 1: Origin, evolution, and characteristics
第8回: [Core Week ⑥] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Chinese aid 2: Aid competition with Western donor country
第9回: [Core Week ⑦] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Chinese aid 3: Belt and Road Initiative
第10回: [Core Week ⑧] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Mid-term exam
第11回: [Core Week ⑨] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Aid and trade 1
第12回: [Core Week ⑩] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Aid and trade 2
第13回: [Core Week ⑪] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Aid and growth
第14回: [Core Week ⑫] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Aid and corruption/war
第15回: [Classes and Examinations Period] Week 1 (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》In-class presentation

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1

成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Students are evaluated by accuracy for understandings of the lectures.
成績評価Grading2: Students are evaluated by accuracy, depth, and originality.
成績評価Grading3: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
Students are evaluated by clarity, depth of understanding, and oral presentation.

name: 【300】開発経済学／Development Economics
